channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Dont do meth + trade boys — 13 replies — 50.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Dont do meth + trade boys

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-24 04:16 UTC

OP

Last year october, while I was eating meth all day everyday i decided to put 500k (my entire lfiesavings) all on ETH.. I am now down to about 200k and its not looking great.

Learn from me gentlemen. I am now genuinely considering those switzerland assisted euthanasia pods if things dont go up soon

Early replies (first 3)

62024576
>>62024567
yikes

62024595
Just don't become an addict. Alcohol, drugs... I was an alcoholic for 10 years and it ruined my life.

Funny thing, I became an alcoholic for being a wagie. I got the night shift because the salary is good and became unable to sleep. I just couldn't sleep. Started drinking to sleep. Then one day I threatened my boss (alcohol rage). Now, I'm not a wagie and I'm not an alcoholic. I'm nothing.

62024602
>>62024567
>eating meth all day everyday
the fuck? I do the same, 90% racemic p2p based methamphetamine hydrochloride

5-25mg a day. im dying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024612
>>62024602
Get some xanax and seroquel and sleep for 3 days

Do yall have the voices? I thought the cartel put a microchip in my brain and was driving me insane before they tortured me to death when I was smoking meth.

62024630
>>62024612
>before they tortured me to death when I was smoking meth.
tell me more anon

the worst ive gotten was bad psychedelic-like visual hallucinations and i always took that as a sign to pop xanax and sleep ASAP

62024635
>>62024630
>bad psychedelic-like visual hallucinations
I got that after 5 days of not sleeping. like visual static.

then I heard a siren in my house. (there is no siren in my house). I went straight to bed and didnt look at anything in the dark and sang in my head because I could no longer trust what I could hear or see.

62024639
>>62024567
>>62024630
to honor this thread im gonna do another 12mg, bless up bro. never smoking this shit but daaammmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmm

62024659
>>62024635
>I got that after 5 days of not sleeping. like visual static.

It was more than static for me. For me, it was like the bright highlights of objects trailed along when i moved my sight - like the outline of the last object was glowing and following where i looked

62024665
>>62024567
going all-in on one investment is already retarded, but going all-in on one shitcoin is fucking braindead

62024666
>>62024635
>I went straight to bed and didnt look at anything in the dark
Goddamn nigga thats some silent hill shit

62024669
My portfolio is 50% MSFT and 50% SPY. I’m down to ~$700,000 from a little over million. Not quite the same, but still a pretty miserable wait.

62024762
>>62024567
Only a tweaker would buy into
>uptober

62024830
>>62024567
Contrary to popular belief Ritalin doesn’t make you a genius. But it will accelerate your present tendencies. Especially if you’re retarded

item.title: >DUDE, AI is definitely going to replace all of our jobs! — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>DUDE, AI is definitely going to replace all of our jobs!

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-03-24 04:17 UTC

OP

>DUDE, AI is definitely going to replace all of our jobs!
>What do you mean the only employers are Walmart and Door dash?
>What do you mean having universal basic income means I have to go to war?

Early replies (first 3)

62024627
The "UBI" narrative is about one thing and one thing alone, the 300T that BoomerX legitimated polity has put the world in a hole and preventing subsidized socialists getting strung up next to polity and bureaucracy.
Its going to be half assed, exploited and ultimately finance the steinging up of socialists, polity and bureaucracy.

No, nobody in the past 80 years and until the genocide materializes is going to be forgotten; you are in a parliament, you got subsidized by the future, you and your family die

62024684
>>62024176
a machine needs a human
but machine with ai doesn't need human or at least most of them, just a dedicated group of ai coders would be enough

62024758
>>62024684
>but machine with ai doesn't need human
Really not what AI has shown.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024783
>>62024758
Nah, like 70% of white collar jobs are bullshit pretend work anyway and there are zero consequences to just making shit up. All of those jobs can easily be replaced by AI.

62024815
>>62024783
now imagine if blue collar jobs will be replaced with crude made machines with ai chips
95% of Humanity in developed contries will be left to starve as there will be no need for them
I'd imagine common people will have to return to being peasants to survive

62024818
>>62024176
Glad, that I own the means of production via stonks.

62024825
>>62024815
But that already happened and nobody cares. If you look at the total labour-hours used to produce the necessities the average human needs to live it works out to like an hour of labour per week per citizen. The other 39 hours are spent on useless corpo jobs that produce almost nothing of real value. When AI replaces people at doing some bullshit task that nobody actually cares about people will just find some new bullshit task to do that AI can't replace them at.

62024832
>>62024815
Isn’t that why UBI was created as a concept? You can't avoid automation and only so many jobs can be made in theory.

62024833
Unironically I'm gonna get into vibbe coding and buy a 3d printer for this reason. With the new tech you can technically BE your own business, you just need to find a fucking niche.

item.title: Day 1672 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M — 5 replies — 15.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Day 1672 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-03-24 04:11 UTC

OP

Day 1672 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Early replies (first 3)

62023992
2033 at the earliest snail poster. I will not explain how i came to this conclusion.

62024001
>>62023965
Hahahaha

62024317
>>62023965

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024336
7 transactions per second

62024819
>>62023965
cute

item.content:encoded:
remember when linkies had hope. now all they have is PAIN. lmao and don't forget the misery. dabble on a little humiliat…

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-03-24 03:11 UTC

OP

remember when linkies had hope. now all they have is PAIN. lmao and don't forget the misery. dabble on a little humiliation as well. and last but not least: incel rage hahahahhahaah

Early replies (first 3)

62015997
yikes

62016663
>>62015997
>yIkEs

62016952
Adem. He won

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62016958
>>62015802
linkies? more like stinkies lol

62016976
>>62015802
Why do you think about LINK all day, every day? Oh that's right, you're a link baggie too.
Kek baggie

62017387
>>62015802
Anon, just so you know that one of the reason I'm still holding this piece of shit LINK is you. The day you stop posting here I am selling. You give me hopium. Thanks.

62017472
>>62015802
The whole market is down stupid

62018502
I HATE ALL FREAKIN STIIIIIINKS and will forever more

62022852
bumparino :}

62022933
>>62015802
Lmao how long have you been posting this by now..

62023622
stinkies are coping with FOLDERS now :} the patheticness speaks for itself

62024698
fuck STIN K lol

item.title: What are the chances of a postwar pump? — 5 replies — 7.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
What are the chances of a postwar pump?

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-03-24 03:51 UTC

OP

Assuming the war wraps up within the next month with either a total Iranian victory and Trump chickening out and returning to status quo ante, or a marginal US victory with Iran being forced back into the cuckshed with shipping returning to normal, what are the chances that we see a recovery on the back of massive inflation, as happened during the Covid lockdown?

Early replies (first 3)

62024719
None, the covid recovery was made through mass money printing. They won't turn the printer on to that scale unless things are very bad.

62024739
Inflation already going to happen , energy prices contribute to the price over everything and energy will not get cheaper despite bussyant trying to artificially lower the futures price of oil.

62024740
Liquidity is dried up because of treasury shorting. No more money as it burned up unless if you’re an insider.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024748
day 25 of 3 day war
>assume the war wraps up within the month

62024782
>>62024703
The effects of this war will be intergenerational, covid will be remembered as a small slip in the economy.

item.title: >online dating is the future of lo-ACK! — 80 replies — 77.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Open thread • Replies: 80 • Updated: 2026-03-24 03:30 UTC

OP

>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Early replies (first 3)

62017513
>>62017496
We already had this thread. Bumble is merely a lesson in why women are retarded.

62017539
Its was just a way to spread stds to a control group of retards

62017623
>>62017496
Are these dating apps even useable on the free tiers? Any time I install one of these you literally cannot do anything unless you pay them some absurd monthly fee like $29 a month. Who actually pays for this crap?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62019192
>>62019188
Zoomers will never know the fertile plains of pussy that were Tinder circa 2013 - 2015. If you were white and vaguely in shape you could sleep with someone new every week with minimal effort.

62019289
>>62019184
>yea she is 18
>that ring
-_-

62019707
>>62017765
If you haven’t realised by now that (the sexual part of) abrahamic religions is just a two thousand year old incel cope, maybe it was always over for you.

62019711
>>62018215
Go see a doctor, you need schizophrenia meds.

62019720
>>62018879
Wtf are you saying relationships don’t always work out?! I have aproached a woman just one time during my entire life but i know the relationship dynamics of humans fully and can say that there would be a dream virgin trad wife with endless romantic and erotic love waiting for us all men if it just wasn’t for those darn jews!

62019725
>>62019131
Kek mistaking you being annoyed when other people openly talk about their romantic success with ”bad manners” just proves what an un-self concious midwit you are. Funny how it’s always mid intelligence people calling other people low iq because they can’t see their own stupidity.

62021049
>>62019289
they sell jewelry at the mall, sperg-kun

62021064
>>62019130
>Brazil
How big were the girl's cocks?

62021075
>>62017623
it's worth it if you're an attractive man and you don't want to swipe a million times for the algo to give you something worth looking at. got my current gf from tinder and I paid for it & I didn't think she would even respond to my message

62021174
>>62017623
Matching apps suck.
Only viable model for avg giy was being able to fire off a message (online approach) to any chick currently online.

You'd be surprised how many guys will pull out there wallet to not even get pussy.

62021180
>>62021174
Needing the woman to pre-approve you talking to her has been a disaster

62021193
Serious advice to all the kids that browse biz. If you're a man that wants a missus and kids, hurry up. Don't listen to those who say "you still have time". You don't wanna get into your 30s single. It's horrible. I've seen horrors like you wouldn't believe. +30 yo females that start crying during the date. They're all fucked up in the head.

62021294
>>62018489
Anon Spain is the kind of place where it is male locals fucking female tourists, not the other way around. It's been that way for decades.
For your needs it is latin america and south east asia that you should be visiting.

62021356
>>62017496
>making a dating app that require women to take the initiative
yeah no shit

62021380
>>62018101
>>62018864
>>62019087
You all are just jealous

62021435
>>62017496
They got greedy, and it's all full of scammers.

62021478
>>62017623
I used Bumble free and I married a girl I met on there.
2 kids as well.
These apps just match you to actual people. I don't understand the seethe, unless you're ugly of course.

62021549
>>62017496
>Dating app crashes when women realize they can just onlyfags instead
Woah

62021571
>>62021478
You must have been using it in the 2010s. It’s all bots and microtransactions now

62022431
>>62017702
I want a virgin wife, though, not some degenerate whore. casual sex is unpleasant desu.

62023902
>>62019161
Oof a random fag makes u list ur life achievments. I got second hand embarassment from reading ur shit brah.

62023951
>>62017496
Time to pick up some cheapies!

62023997
>>62021049
An 18-year-old wearing that big-ass cubic zirconia on her pointer finger?
I don't think so.

62024069
>>62017702
kys shill

62024197
>>62017623
I think I spent about $600 on Tinder almost a decade ago.

It resulted in hookups with 15 girls.
Many of which I hooked up with multiple times.
Some of them were longer FWB situations.
A couple turned into actual relationships.

Even if you assume minimal ROI (only hooking up once) it cost me $40 per girl.
AND the premium features also saved me a lot of time on the app, that's ROI too.
Most of the money was spent in short bursts while abroad on trips when time was limited and I wanted to maximize my pull. I'm pretty sure I'd have missed these opportunities if I wasn't premium boosted to the max and all that.

$600 sounds like a lot of money but $40 a girl really is an amazing deal in my book.
The time sink the app still was is where the pain is, the grind that is dealing with all the flaking and ghosting. THAT is what sucks.

If you'd give me a machine that took $40 and delivered me a fun girl who is looking to hookup every single time I'd pay without hesitation until the end of time.

inb4 poorfags complain $40/g is a lot of money. $600 isn't even, literal peanuts for living out some great sexual fantasies and farming memories for a lifetime.

62024432
>>62019188
These dating sites were plagued with adulterers since the 90's. It was only ever good for people in their late teens to meet each other after 2000. That is where your nostalgia and lack of attention to what was going on with older people trying to find love during those brief glory days. I never tried it to avoid dating someone who was married.

62024446
>>62024197
>spent about $600 on Tinder almost a decade ago.
I agree wholeheartedly 100% with the pay approach and have done it myself, but the issue is that $600 won't get you nearly as far as it did 10 years ago due to the failing company greed and algo changes.

62024454
>>62017710
>indians and other non-whites
Serious question; how are white women supposed to use these sites if they always have 800 likes from India everyday?

62024523
dating apps became shitty because they got flooded with normies

a decade ago online dating was still somewhat taboo, you could pick up some hot alt chick looking a for a slutty thrill with minimal effort cuz online dating gave normies the ick

now every one and their mother is on the app, competition is so high you have better odds RETVRNing to tradition and trying your luck at a bar or night club

62024730
Why would I do any of that shit when cocaine is cheap and porn is free? I can stim goon all night and not have to deal with any of the bullshit of dealing with a woman.

item.title: GOLD RUGGED — 89 replies — 25.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
GOLD RUGGED

Open thread • Replies: 89 • Updated: 2026-03-24 01:04 UTC

OP

GOLD RUGGED
O
L
D

R
U
G
G
E
D

Early replies (first 3)

61998901
Bitcoin too! Wtf is going on!?

61998912
>>61998888
based quads

61998913
Intense bombings that are destroying crucial infrastructure + FED conference in a few hours. It was obvious

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62010070
>>61998888
checked

62010074
>>61998888
okbye

62010178
>>62000000

62010196
>>61999999

62011319
>>62010048
>posts the silver chart

Fuck off heeb

62011372
>>62004017
>I mean the world is on the brink of collapse
People hoard gold for the end of the world, anon. They think the world is ending, so now they are selling their gold. This is the end result of buying gold.

62011388
>>62010178

62013826
>>62010048
>>62011319
Here's the gold one, adjusted for inflation.

62013889
>>61998888
Gold is meant for you to go in-and-out of. It's money. That's why the bid-ask spread is so tiny compared to other assets. Compare that to when real estate rugs and the bid-ask gets blown the fuck out.

62014578
>>61998888
you think gold got rugged? wait until you see what happened to the fiat currency in your wallet. OOF!

62018505
>>61998888
Checked now it rugged

62018519
why they make couns of gold. They should make it of something valuable like iron or granite

62018806
I-I...I haven't checked my porfolio in a week lol

62018808
>>61998888
chinese old ladies were mass buying gold did you really think they were going to make it?

62018880
>>62018808
ouch...
I just bought 50g more of asian gold at 4550 last week because I have the soul of a chinese old lady

62018943
>>62018880
You don't because if you had you'd be selling the gold to a fat western pig

62018963
>>62013826
>>62010048
>posting obvious multiyear long cup and handles
Also, I don't recall the collapse of the petrodollar in the 1990s and 2000s.

62018973
>>62018943
I'm starting to put all my extra monies into chinese old lady gold bars because it can buy me 10 ladyboys and a dim sum when times get hard.

62019090
>>62018806
I haven't checked in a month LOL
It's too hopeless I don't care anymore.
probably gonna kill myself before 2027.

62019602
>>62004017
people soon wont be able to afford food or gas why would they be buying shiny rocks

62019664
>>61998888
biz is the best top signal indicator. That and the moon boys on you tube.

62019685
I hate jew so fucking much its unreal

62019700
>>62019685
we all do...
but I hate americans more, because they have the power to stop them, but chose to obey or do nothing. their freedom is fake and the 2nd amendment is just for show.
3 weeks into the war and NOT A SINGLE protest on the street. fucking pathetic.
Their cowardice, their inaction would soon lead to the suffering of literal BILLIONS of people and their descendant, including themselves.
pathetic group of cattle.

62019745
>>61998888
IT KEEPS GOING DOWN

62019946
6% crash and its just monday, its going to zero, kekaroo.

62019955
>>61998888
So much for $10,000.oo gold lol

62019957
I feel nothing but an intense hatred for Trump.
The orange retard would rather nuke Iran than disobey Israel.

62020897
Why is it growing again? FFS I don t get anything

62020914
>>61999090
Western Russia used to be part of a very gay country.
The gold price was driven by chinese speculation

62024363
>>62019745
>KEEPS GOING DOWN
lol
I'm torn because I want everyone on /biz/ to make money, but I also want the arrogant, smug, condescending gold dudes to shut the fuck up.

item.title: Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore. — 35 replies — 21.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore.

Open thread • Replies: 35 • Updated: 2026-03-24 02:54 UTC

OP

Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore.
>at the $15 million and up price point the preference is doorman style apartment buildings, especially if this is a residence and not an investment
Why?

Early replies (first 3)

62013834
Tartaria..

62013851
>>62013830
All the ultra luxury housing in NY is speculative investment. No one lives in those fancy new high rises much less in these "mansions".

62013855
why don't the sellers lower the price

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62014132
why are people not lining up for the nyc mansions? do they truly prefer 300sqft studios?
it's hard to understand people. a mystery really

62014160
>>62013830
Panic room sure was a movie.

62014163
Security.

62014184
For people with that much money, jurisdiction matters more than location.

62014197
>>62013830
Give me $50M and I'll buy one

62014199
>>62014169
rich liberals love the hustle and the bustle
doubt theres any bums loitering around there

62014207
>>62014197
If someone gives you $50M now, you will try to gamble it on shitcoins, you know, to double it. And lose it all to a DEX scam.

62014208
>>62014169
>>62014099
Trying to decide if I want to explain or if I just trust my instincts that these are Israeli glowies.

62014566
>>62013830
> old
> over priced
> falling apart
> require substantial renovations
> cheaper and better options available pretty much anywhere else
> crowded, high property tax area
it really is a mystery isn't it?

62014765
>>62013830
N.

62015476
NYC is a brasil-level shithole to europeans these days. We’d rather livd in the hustle and bustle of our own european cities.

62015477
>>62014099
Yeah exactly, to european standards the metro is fucking ancient and in a very decayed condition.

62015485
>>62014199
Read >>62015476 there are way better cities for hustle and bustle these days. Somehow despite americans living in hyper violent cities with poor infrastructure, their night life is pretty tame and behind in trends compared to europe’s big cities.

62015603
>>62013830
looks like some gangbangers could easily kill you with a driveby shooting and you already put a target on your back buying it

62015736
>>62013874
This, likely. Boomers are in denial that no one can afford their overpriced real estate.

62015742
New york city is really, really crowded. It's hard to move around, either walking, driving, or subway. With that swell comes a lot of noise, dirt, and unpleasant encounters with foreigners.

62018124
>>62014169
Jewyorkers like to visit art galeries, go to theatre, concerts, trendy bars, nightclubs, restaurants...

62018156
>>62018124
Those are literally everywhere.

62022891
Why do chuds laser-focus on the least violent city in the US to talk about crime? NYC is famously much safer than other metros.

62022913
>>62014169
>"New york is the best city in the world"
-someone who's never been to like Tokyo or barcelona or Hong kong or ...

62022968
>>62015742
>really, really crowded
Lol have you been there at all in the past 6 years? There's nobody there except the poors that couldn't afford to leave. Everybody that's still there was just faking it until they made it, which is incredibly shitty advice that stopped being useful 20 years ago. The bridge and tunnel crowd is the only thing keeping it from going under.

62022987
>>62013830
>why aren't richfags buying mansions in a city where the mayor explicitly wants to tax them (and everyone else) to death?!?

62023570
>>62013830
Why is that image so weirdly dark?

62023591
>>62023570
op blocked by the paywall below

62023592
>>62023570
Socio-economic factors.

62024002
>>62023570
Steiny vibes.

62024023
>>62014099
maybe you're foreign or just a hick, but rich people don't use the subway

62024577
>>62013830
Stop posting paywall articles

62024616
>>62024023
Rich people also probably prefer a high rise penthouse or multi floor condo over a street level townhouse in plain view of the street riff raff.

62024673
>>62013830
it's because Mamdani wants to shit diarrhea all over millionaires. Surprise, then millionaires leave for Florida and other based states. whoops. I guess socialism is fucking retarded and doesn't work.

item.title: My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of m… — 11 replies — 14.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of m…

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-03-24 03:44 UTC

OP

My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of my life to get. I'm shaking in fear right now. What should I do?

Early replies (first 3)

62024372
>>62024371
LISTEN! Close that long. Why would you want to destroy your account?

62024374
You can't print if you stop betting.

62024382
>>62024371
Look here look listen! Listen pimp, you should probably get out of the position

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024384
>>62024372
dont worry, no account is getting destroyed because OP is just a LARP.

62024404
>>62024371
shiiiiieeeet hold that bitch nigga dont puss out like no buster

62024457
I dont understand why people who do these Long or short trades would ever do it with money they can't afford to lose. If you lose all your money you deserve it, hope you don't though, but you're a dumbass either way.

62024467
FUCK FUCK FUCK

62024477
>>62024467
post positions

62024481
>>62024467
Close it and long oil 20x to make your losses back and more! You've got this!

62024624
>>62024467
Anon it’s about to go back under 70k. You have 3 hours at most. Fucking close your position you retard

62024770
>>62024481
Needs an update with the US in the coils crying out to the rest of the world for help. This is pathetic.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 101 replies — 11.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 101 • Updated: 2026-03-23 19:45 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61998660
>>61932834

This shit is going to 100 dollars isnt it

61998672
>>61997626
Oh shit anon. We should've told you that if YOU buy then it's going to 0$. You should sell and then after you sell we'll GIGA ULTRA MEGA PUMP to 100$+

61998866
>>61998660
Yes. Yes it is

61999089
>>61998866
Did you buy?

62000247
>>61999089
Of course. 100 DOT holder reporting in

62000433
>>62000247
It's over guys. This guy doomed us. Because he bought it's going to 0$. Please sell before I put my DOT into my cars brakes.

62004150
>>62000247
The moment you bough the whole market started dumping.

62007000
100$ end of bull run. Is it possible to keep the thread alive for 1 full month? 15 days to go!

62007009
How much are they paying you jeets to post here?

62007046
>>62007009
Well... The question is... How much do you want to get paid to jeet like we do? We can easily mog your jobs salary. JEETMAXXING

62007254
>>62007009
Zero. Plus im white

62008295
>>62007254
Good one dear fren Rajakesh Pujakistan. That'll convince him. Now post your white hand with a timestamp. Picrel is me and my white hand sar

62010139
So... When's JAM coming out guys? Those fuckers stopped doing the monthly development calls

62010191
>>62010139
If you're not a bot, here's a question: why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.

62010262
>>62010191
I'm really glad you brought that up anon. Great question! And if I want to answer it properly, like you deserve, my good sar, then I'll need a bit more information
>why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.
What do you mean by constantly humiliate myself? Can you help me understand that

62011878
100$ end of bull run

62014468
You did notice that the activity is actually up by a large % since Acurast launched their corechains (https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily), right guys?

62014587
>>62010191
False rumor about Gavin

62015928
>>62014587
Don't lie. Why do you think they call him WOOD? And he literally looks like a 7yo boy pedo, just look at him. If I googled "Pedophile" then Gavins picture would probably be #2, right after Epstein. And since we're talking about Epstein... Gavin and Epstein were partying all the time together.

62016012
>>62015928
Oh shit. You are a bot

62016043
>>62016012
Could a bot post pictures of his hands with a timestamp? Like I did here; >>62008295 ??? Makes no sense, right?

62016887
>>62016043
So are you for DOT or not

62016901
>>62016887
What do you mean by FOR? Could you define that a little bit more?

62016960
>>61932834
How does a thread with only 94 posts from 20 days ago exist? Dot fag must be bumping it everyday when it hits page 10.

62016999
>>62016960
Read this >>62007000
Also. This is now a DOT board. /biz/ was always a DOT board

62019865
100$ end of bull run

62019872
>>62019865
75

62020329
>>62019872
Dear Punjabista Rajakesh

We talked about this. I first write 100$ and then after it reaches the 9th page you bump the thread and you write 75$. Don't bump the thread before that or Gavin won't pay us DOT for shilling this project.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62021618
>>62016901
What's so hard to understand? Do you support the project?

62023262
>>62021618
>Do you support the project?
In what way? I don't support every decision of the project I guess... But as a whole I really do believe it's the one of the ONLY cryptos worth while. The thing is... Most people don't care about decentralization as a whole and that's why the sector is, in a sense, going under. People got to greedy and lost their roots. Everyone just wants a quick x100 meme coin and that's a big part of the reason there literally was no bull run outside of BTC and a few select meme scam coins. People always destroy everything. It just is how it is. The thing is though. People won't be able to ignore DOT forever. It is what ETH literally wants to be. It has EVERYTHING ETH wants to have in the next 10-15 year. And JAM will probably hit some time this year.

item.content:encoded:
>MFW BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS SINCE THEIR ENTIRE SOCIETY IN DEPENDENT ON CARS

Open thread • Replies: 68 • Updated: 2026-03-23 17:54 UTC

OP

>MFW BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS SINCE THEIR ENTIRE SOCIETY IN DEPENDENT ON CARS

Early replies (first 3)

62011346
This kills the burger

62011349
$5 for gas where I am at. Probably going to get worse. Feels fucking bad man

62011356
>>62011349
7.50 dollars a gallon where I'm at, and after tip it's closer to 9.50.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62017466
>>62015115
I'm sorry that a little sweat, sun, and rain is such a hardship for your delicate skin

62017470
>>62011654
A BYD car in Israel survived a missile strike. All passengers survived, and the car did not even catch on fire

62017481
>>62015052
People don't get stabbed on public transport in europe.

62017502
>>62011291
All that's going to happen is a major recession and Republicans getting completely wiped out in November. Perhaps to never recover again, though I wouldn't bet on it

62017505
>>62015074
>having to ride a bike when you can listen to whatever music you like blazing loud (aftermarket stereo in my car, expensive but worth it)
>not at direct risk of niggers/arabs attacking me, secret wpns in my car when needed
>perfect weather control
>fragrant cuz of air fresheners
look, its nice you're getting exercise, but its hot where i live, and i don't want to smell in the workplace. Cars are unfathomably based.

62017509
>>62017470
its important that the batteries don't get breached, this is a scenario where the batteries being on the bottom of the car helped alot i guess.

That being said, even a fragment of a land mine hitting an EV=quick death.

62017511
>>62011291
Water you on about? Gas is still like a considerably cheaper than when Sleepy Joe was in office. It's really not that expensive at all.

62017512
having your entire country rely on commodity prices is 3rd world shit. America is a 3rd world country. If gas prices go up their entire economy folds like a cart house

62017518
>>62017512
Then why does the rest of the world crash every time we do?

62017618
>>62017518
2008 was way milder in europe.

62017761
>>62011380
this will break half of america plus everything else will tick up oil <60/b really makes you wonder why inflation wasnt squashed its the interest rates

62017814
>>62011404
I have an electric bmw, but I only drive like once a week because I live in a neighborhood where I can walk everywhere and I’m constantly high or drunk lol

62018404
>>62011291
ICE cars, no less kek
>EVs bad!! you must consoom oil, goy

62018429
I like to keep 100 gallons on hand just in case

62018433
>>62011404
EVChuds WON

ICEssies on suicide watch :(

62018438
>>62011600
>>62011654
>>62017470
>>62017509
it's not only the batteries being made using a tech that is harder to burn (LFP), but also BYD batteries are designed to avoid/suppress fires

>>62011710
>>62011722
kek

62018457
>>62011349
bet u brag about your high salary though

62018523
>>62018404
Haha yeah EVs, which run on what...

62018543
>>62018523
what are you trying to say here? they run on electrical energy collected from the sun and stored in batteries.

62019367
>>62011291
>BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS
Thats news to me man and I live in California
5.25 Gas for me if anyone is wondering

62021710
>>62018543
8 years and those batteries are 50% capacity at best or less and need to be 'recycled', which means incinerated and dumped in a toxic waste dump.

62021754
>>62021710
>8 years and those batteries are 50% capacity at best

62021918
>>62017470
>boils your dog

62022004
>>62021710
8 years and 50% of your gas car gets rear ended by shitbox nissan altimas going 30mph over the speed limit

62022307
>>62015074
I have a surprise for you. I live in America and I own a car AND a bicycle! Imagine that! I get to choose which I use and when. To be honest, I LOVE the Japanese rail system. But Americans are selfish pigs and can't have anything that nice without ruining it. Also America is bigger than you can imagine and a national rail system anything like the Japanese system would be unaffordable.

62022408
>>62022307
>But Americans are selfish pigs and can't have anything that nice without ruining it.

>>62021754
a tesla cultist who bought it when it was all the meme-hype and still posts on the fucking tesla forums of all places? frankly i struggle to believe anything he says, but only charging to 80-90% does help alot with longevity for lithium batteries. Dudes probably a silicon valley ceo and parks it underground at work.

62022499
>>62011291
>>62011346
There is no need for rationing, just let the price free.
This causes the demand to go lower, only those who essential need gas are going to buy it.
$50 per gallon would make the world a better place.

62022561
>>62022307
nigger we did a national rail system a century ago but the railroad lobby was butting heads with the oil lobby and guess who won

don't give me bullshit about "affordability", there are lobbyists at play here defending the means of transportation which most efficiently extracts wealth from you

every argument you have FOR our hellscape highway system came straight from an Exxon-funded thinktank and was disseminated by an JIDF bot farm

62022746
>in yurop we aren't even allowed to have cars innit! We just ride da trolly wif mudslimes and niggers! EUROPEAN SUPREMACY!

BASED

62022776
>>62011349

62017589

62017615

62017643
>>62015789

62017817

62017823

62017855
>>62017823

These incidents occurred globally, with notable cases in the United States, Canada, India, Russia, and Montenegro.

62017885
>>62015789
its funny the 48 hr mark happens when markets are closed lmao 9:30-4 every holiday off in 2026 gay ass market

62019187
>>62015793

the only thing there is to do is get boots on the ground and drive the iranian military out of the cities so they eventually surrender or die from lack of food and water in the tunnels

62019528

62019612
>>62016531

62019615

62019731

62019775

62019882

62019982

62020016

62020058
>>62017543

item.title: it's over — 21 replies — 5.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
it's over

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-03-24 00:47 UTC

OP

They're going to rugpull the entire US economy

Early replies (first 3)

62020090
I think they can keep the plates spinning for another decade, maybe two.

62020123
>$64 trillion baked in
Fucking hell

62020245
eh I wouldn't worry about it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62020361
>>62020044
the us always has her military to back her debt.
just don't think about how utterly incapable of winning wars evem against the most backwards of enemies they are.

62020374
>>62020044
And why is that my problem?

62020436
>>62020044
>64 trillion
>that's 25 trillion in 10 years
Holy shit the USA is just going to go "lol I'm not paying for that shit" one of these days and crash the global economy harder than the Bronze Age Collapse.

62020555
>>62020044
Those are some rookie numbers.
Japan's debt to GDP ratio is 237%. Us is only at 128%

62020581
>>62020090
this, everyone knows its a ponzi but it'll drag on

62020616
>>62020581
Because what's the alternative?

62020654
Countries without net debt are already setting population caps kek

62020814
>>62020361
>the us always has her military
Not when Gen Alpha doesn't want to die for Isreal and hyperinflation is just around the corner.

62021427
>>62020436
>the USA is just going to go "lol I'm not paying for that shit" one of these days and crash the global economy
guess which banks and pension funds are the most exposed to US bonds
it's like you guys don't have access to the internet sometimes, but somehow found a way to broadcast your retarded post into here

it's amazing how you were able to get past the captcha

62021448
>>62020361

>her military

You mean the sheboons mutinying and clogging toilets and setting shit on fire?

62021561
>>62020044
Stop being a bitch and make the debt ceiling at 50 gazillion. Problem solved, you are welcome.

62021659
>>62020044
If Powell would LOWER THE FUCKING RATES we could refinance and be done with it

62021695
>>62020044
Literally not my problem, you took out the debt, not me.

62023423
>>62020044
>no inflection point
>linear scale
They will, but this train still has tracks

62023427
>>62020044
Debt is good though

62023857
>>62021695
They're making it your problem via inflation (an invisible tax via purchasing power destruction). All of this could have been avoided if past Americans didn't let rootless private banker jews gain control over currency issuance (the FED ponzi) and wean everyone off of precious metals for a century. It all comes down eventually though, the world doesn't want America's jew-printed debt notes anymore. You'd best start believing in controlled demolitions - you're in one.
>>62023427
Debt is Slavery, so for some, yes it's good, for your goyim ass though? Very bad.

62024118
>>62020044
what's the point of saying
>for the first time in history
?
it only goes up so the latest number will always be the first in history

62024312
>>62020044
Please forgive my financial ignorance, what's the breaking point? Where does everything go sideways?

item.title: >world go bad gold must always go up >WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??! — 73 replies — 5.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
>world go bad gold must always go up >WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??!

Open thread • Replies: 73 • Updated: 2026-03-23 15:22 UTC

OP

>world go bad gold must always go up
>WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??!
Is the most brain dead retarded take imaginable. These retards fail to understand the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use.

Early replies (first 3)

62006969
>>62006961
These are the same type of people who bought gamestop btw.

62006976
>>62006969
digits... checked

62006979
>>62006961
Probably a horde of cunts started leveraging themselves long up the ass when the war started.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62012611
>>62012210
CNBC are disingenuous and intentionally ignore how the political instability and the need unwind leverage are the reason gold is being sold.

62012673
>>62006961
>cash out all your gold
>yolo into oil
It's retarded but it works. They're probably overleveraged to shit on paper trades

62015367
Orange Man Bad about to turn off Iran's lights
BTC shits the bed like gold did
>the only real inflation hedge has always been bullets after all

62015386
>>62006961
I bought back in 2023. I'm not worried

62015392
>>62006961
gold drops when people know there wont be a rebuilding phase after an apocalypse

62015545
>>62006961
No. I will never buy your useless rocks, retard.

62015709
Price is malleable. Supply is not.

62015716
>>62006961
It doesn’t have to go up.all they have to do is make it unobtainable for normies.
Most normies can barely afford to fill their gas tanks or spend close to as much as the use to a year ago.what make you think they could afford to buy a shiny rock at current prices?

62015768
it's arabs selling their gold because they need cash since they can't reliably sell their oil

62015770
>>62007829
>Anon is jealous of
>>62006969
>Digits

62015784
>>62006961
Because when shtf people sell gold first to pay to have it cleaned up.

62016992
>>62006961
Gold is up 4% YTD. In the next two years we will see >7000$ Gold. Inflation and the decline of the World Reserve currency just started

62017010
>>62006961
>why is a shiny rock with no use case crashing?!
Truly a mystery.

62017033
>>62006961
When it hits six hundred dollars again I am buying and hodling

62017090
>>62006961
>the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use.
which has almost no weight to the actual price

62017143
>>62006990
Give it a minute, wait until WW3 before selling.

62017279
>>62007712
I look like this actually

62018771
>>62017090
correct
the price of gold has been tied for the most part to a generation of useful idiots that have become a net negative cashflow this year and recently to the PBC and Bank id Russia having tried the most desperate re-hypothecation scam ever on the planet

62018796
>>62006961
>world go bad
>you have lot of money
gold go up
>world go bad
>while you can't sell oil for money and now need to buy food buy selling gold
gold go down

Iran middleast has back channels for selling. Gold might go further down when they sell gold to buy water. Desalination plants are next on the list

62018972
>>62006961
I can explain this phenomenon.
The thing is, gold is crashing BECAUSE it is considered one of the safest assets . Gold is being used as a COLLATERAL for debt.
But now the economy of THE ENTIRE PLANET is in the shitter thanks to jewish demons and orange man the jewish slave (I hate them so fucking much), people NEED MONEY to pay for living and debt, so they're selling gold. this triggers price decrease which triggers MARGIN CALL, which triggers another round of gold selling and so on.

tldr >>62018796

62018998
>>62018972
This will likely continue until the USD stops being a reliable method of payment globally. Gold and other PMs will become the universal currency between the various new blocs that emerge.

The death of the USD will raise gold prices in USD.

62019039
>>62018998
>USD is going to stop being a reliable currency
that's not going to happen in your or my lifetime

62019046
>>62018972
its safe therefore it crashes first

62019183
>>62006961
I caused this. I just bought 2 ounces of gold from my dad literally yesterday

62019242
>>62006961
The irony is OP is the retard. Imagine gloating over this. Ofc gold has to correct after what it just did.

62019643
>>62006961
>>62007032
Gold is falling largely from the liquidity squeeze in the broader world and middle east. Gold crashing is not proof that there is no risk or that gold is being priced as no longer the risk off, it is the risk materializing into markets and everyone being forced to sell what they have to meet margins/etc. Same happens literally every crash and literally every crash people act shocked and literally every crash gold explodes higher than it crashed from after.
>>62007658
Go back to rebbit.

62019669
>>62019046
Yes because people (and institutions, including nations) need to liquidate SOMETHING to cash out and afford necessities. big portion of that something is gold.

62019773
>>62006961
SELL SELL SELL

62019906
>just hold for another decade goy
bagholder retards, kek

62021844
>>62012210
>inflation means prices go down
>war is peace
>it's true until everything the people believe is false
